overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City. The player crosses a sunlit intersection with holographic advertisements overhead, walks along a commercial sidewalk, explores a narrow alleyway with a homeless encampment, and continues down a neon-lit street with towering digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city intersection with holographic advertisements

events.description: crossing the street alongside other pedestrians while vehicles pass by

agents.ego_description: walking across the sunlit intersection toward the commercial district with tall buildings

notable_agents.action: red vintage car driving along the street
group of pedestrians waiting at the crosswalk corner

entered.detail: large colorful holographic advertisement ribbon suspended between skyscrapers
massive digital billboard displaying a muscular figure with health warning text
tall palm tree on the sidewalk edge
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing with red text

segments.scene_description: The clip opens at a bright sunlit intersection in a futuristic city. The camera crosses the street alongside pedestrians, passing under a massive colorful holographic ribbon structure suspended between buildings. A large digital billboard displaying a health warning dominates the right side of the view as vehicles drive past.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial sidewalk with digital advertisements

events.description: entering the covered walkway area with overhead scaffolding and billboards
passing a large black truck parked on the street side temporarily blocking the view

agents.ego_description: walking along the orange textured sidewalk past parked vehicles and storefronts

notable_agents.action: woman with blue backpack walking ahead and talking on her phone

entered.detail: large black armored truck parked along the curb
illuminated storefront sign with red neon lettering
industrial scaffolding structure along the building facade
multiple large digital screens displaying advertisements including EL GUAPO

segments.scene_description: Moving from the open intersection into a semi-covered commercial walkway, the camera passes a large black truck and walks along an orange textured sidewalk. Metal scaffolding lines the right side while massive digital billboards display advertisements overhead. A woman with a blue backpack walks ahead while talking on her phone.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed alleyway with homeless encampment labeled La Huesuda

events.description: turning right into the narrow alley with red walls and metal fencing
approaching the homeless encampment with burning barrel and makeshift shelter

agents.ego_description: entering the narrow alley to observe the homeless encampment, then turning back toward the main street

notable_agents.action: shirtless man with cybernetic arm sitting on the ground near a fire barrel
man sitting against the wall near a makeshift tent

entered.detail: large purple neon sign reading LA HUESUDA mounted on red wall
metal barrel with open flame providing heat and light
improvised shelter constructed from tarps and wooden poles
scattered trash, cardboard, and discarded items on red floor tiles

segments.scene_description: The camera turns into a narrow enclosed alleyway with red walls and industrial scaffolding. A neon sign reads LA HUESUDA above a homeless encampment where two men sit near a burning barrel and makeshift tent. The space is cluttered with debris and trash. After observing the scene, the camera turns back toward the main street.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with neon storefronts and overhead walkways

events.description: exiting the alley back onto the main commercial street
passing by various storefronts and neon signs while maintaining steady pace

agents.ego_description: continuing down the commercial sidewalk past neon signs and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in camouflage jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: green circular neon sign reading OPEN on a storefront
large industrial air conditioning units mounted on building exterior
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings across the street
large digital advertisement for EL GUAPO with character image

segments.scene_description: Exiting the alley back onto the main commercial street, the camera continues walking past various storefronts with neon signs including a green OPEN sign. Industrial ventilation equipment lines the right side of the street while overhead walkways and digital billboards span the road above. A man in a camouflage jacket walks ahead as the camera moves deeper into the commercial district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bright, open city intersection into the gritty depths of a narrow alleyway before returning to a neon-lit commercial district. It begins by crossing a sunlit street beneath a massive colorful holographic ribbon and a towering health warning billboard. As the camera moves from the open road into a semi-covered walkway, the environment shifts to an orange textured sidewalk lined with metal scaffolding and overhead advertisements. The scene then turns sharply into a cramped, red-walled alleyway cluttered with debris, passing a burning barrel and a homeless encampment beneath a neon sign. Finally, the camera exits the enclosure and returns to the main street, moving past glowing storefronts and industrial ventilation equipment toward the heart of the commercial district.
